round_count.title: Debate rounds
round_count.description: Number of debate rounds to run after independent proposals.

debaters.title: Debaters
debaters.description: Agents who write proposals and take turns during the debate.

tools.title: Debate tools
tools.description: Tools available while participants respond during debate rounds.

mode.title: Full history
mode.description: Include every completed turn when generating the next response.

mode.title: Full history
mode.description: Include every completed turn when generating the next response.

mode.title: Judge LLM
mode.description: Use an AI judge to select the final resolution.

judge.title: Judge
judge.description: Agent that resolves the debate after the final round.

mode.title: Judge LLM
mode.description: Use an AI judge to select the final resolution.

mode.title: No automatic resolution
mode.description: Do not select a final resolution automatically.

mode.title: No automatic resolution
mode.description: Do not select a final resolution automatically.

model.title: Model
model.description: AI model used to generate this participant's responses.

system_prompt.title: System prompt
system_prompt.description: Instructions that shape how this participant behaves.

reasoning_effort.title: Reasoning effort
reasoning_effort.description: Model reasoning effort used for this participant's responses.

verbosity.description: Output verbosity used for this participant's responses.

temperature.title: Temperature
temperature.description: Sampling temperature used for this participant's responses.

type.title: Role
type.description: Role this participant has in the session.

tools.title: Proposal tools
tools.description: Tools available while participants write their initial proposals.

mode.title: Round robin
mode.description: Give each participant a turn in sequence.

mode.title: Round robin
mode.description: Give each participant a turn in sequence.

prompt.title: Session prompt
prompt.description: Prompt that defines the session topic and instructions for participants.

seed.title: Seed
seed.description: Optional deterministic seed for random app behavior. Leave blank to generate one.

mode.title: Shuffled
mode.description: Give each participant one turn in a deterministic seeded random order.

mode.title: Shuffled
mode.description: Give each participant one turn in a deterministic seeded random order.

mode.title: Sliding window
mode.description: Include only the most recent completed turns when generating the next response.

window_size.title: Window size
window_size.description: Number of recent completed turns to include.
